from __future__ import annotations

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class ConnectionOptions:
    timeout: float
    retries: int
    use_ssl: bool
    verify_cert: bool
    pool_size: int


def long_parameter_list_of_primitives_without_options_object_negative(host: str, port: int, options: ConnectionOptions) -> str:
    return f"{host}:{port} timeout={options.timeout} retries={options.retries}"
